meaning: adj.(沙粒等的)颗粒测定的,粒度测定的
examples: Fractal structure features of granulometric distribution in sliding zone soils of landslides are studied based on the fractal theory.
It is concluded that granulometric composition, microstructure, specific moisture content, compacting power efficiency are the main factors in...
On the basis of granulometric analysis of samples from colluvial wedge sediments caused by normal fault, the sedimentary environment is discussed.
